languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

languages.text: "Все остальные коммуникационные потребности успешно закрывает мой дражайший коллега".
"My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."
languages.original_text: "Все остальные коммуникационные потребности успешно закрывает мой дражайший коллега".

traits.locale_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."
"My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."
"My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

languages.text: «Mi querido colega cumple con todas las demás necesidades comunicativas ampliamente».
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

traits.locale_text: «Mi querido colega cumple con todas las demás necesidades comunicativas ampliamente».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚足以满足所有沟通方面的需求。”
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚足以满足所有沟通方面的需求。”

languages.text: « Mon cher collègue répond largement à tous mes autres besoins en matière de communication. »
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cher collègue répond largement à tous mes autres besoins en matière de communication. »

languages.text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege erfüllt alle anderen Kommunikationsbedürfnisse vortrefflich."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

traits.locale_text: "Mein geschätzter Kollege erfüllt alle anderen Kommunikationsbedürfnisse vortrefflich."

languages.text: "私の親愛なる同僚は、他のすべてのコミュニケーションニーズに十分に応えてくれる"
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

languages.text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, diğer tüm iletişim ihtiyaçlarımı fazlasıyla karşılıyor."
languages.original_text: "My dearest colleague amply meets all other communication needs."

traits.locale_text: "Pek değerli meslektaşım, diğer tüm iletişim ihtiyaçlarımı fazlasıyla karşılıyor."
